name: Raspberry Meringues (Pressed Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 225°F (107°C).
2. Cover cookie sheets with brown paper.
3. In a small bowl, beat egg whites, cream of tartar, and salt until soft peaks form.
4. Gradually add sugar, beating until very stiff peaks form, about 10 minutes.
5. Add preserves (not jelly) and food coloring; beat one minute at high speed.
6. Pipe meringue with a pastry tube into 1-inch rosettes onto prepared cookie sheets.
7. Bake for 2 hours.
8. Allow to cool completely before removing from paper.
Makes 3 dozen.
